verses.latin_vulgate: Abraham vero aliam duxit uxorem nomine Ceturam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֧סֶף אַבְרָהָ֛ם וַיִּקַּ֥ח אִשָּׁ֖ה וּשְׁמָ֥הּ קְטוּרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abraham married another wife named Cetura:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abraham taas otti emännän nimeltä Ketura.
verses.king_james: Then again Abraham took a wife, and her name was Keturah.

verses.latin_vulgate: quæ peperit ei Zamran et Jecsan, et Madan, et Madian, et Jesboc, et Sue.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתֵּ֣לֶד ל֗וֹ אֶת־זִמְרָן֙ וְאֶת־יׇקְשָׁ֔ן וְאֶת־מְדָ֖ן וְאֶת־מִדְיָ֑ן וְאֶת־יִשְׁבָּ֖ק וְאֶת־שֽׁוּחַ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who bore him Zamram, and Jecsan, and Madan, and Madian, and Jesboc, and Sue.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän synnytti hänelle Simran ja Joksan, ja Medan ja Midian, ja Jesbakin ja Suan.
verses.king_james: And she bare him Zimran, and Jokshan, and Medan, and Midian, and Ishbak, and Shuah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jecsan quoque genuit Saba et Dadan. Filii Dadan fuerunt Assurim, et Latusim, et Loomin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיׇקְשָׁ֣ן יָלַ֔ד אֶת־שְׁבָ֖א וְאֶת־דְּדָ֑ן וּבְנֵ֣י דְדָ֔ן הָי֛וּ אַשּׁוּרִ֥ם וּלְטוּשִׁ֖ם וּלְאֻמִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Jecsan also begot Saba, and Dadan. The children of Dadan were Assurim, and Latusim, and Loomim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Joksan siitti Seban ja Dedanin. Dedanin lapset olivat: Asserim, Letusin ja Luumim.
verses.king_james: And Jokshan begat Sheba, and Dedan. And the sons of Dedan were Asshurim, and Letushim, and Leummim.

verses.latin_vulgate: At vero ex Madian ortus est Epha, et Opher, et Henoch, et Abida, et Eldaa : omnes hi filii Ceturæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנֵ֣י מִדְיָ֗ן עֵיפָ֤ה וָעֵ֙פֶר֙ וַחֲנֹ֔ךְ וַאֲבִידָ֖ע וְאֶלְדָּעָ֑ה כׇּל־אֵ֖לֶּה בְּנֵ֥י קְטוּרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But of Madian was born Epha, and Opher, and Henoch, and Abida, and Eldaa: all these were the children of Cetura.
verses.finnish_biblia: Midianin lapset olivat: Epha, Epher, Hanok, Abida, ja Eldaa: nämät kaikki ovat Keturan pojat.
verses.king_james: And the sons of Midian; Ephah, and Epher, and Hanoch, and Abida, and Eldaah. All these were the children of Keturah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deditque Abraham cuncta quæ possederat, Isaac :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֧ן אַבְרָהָ֛ם אֶת־כׇּל־אֲשֶׁר־ל֖וֹ לְיִצְחָֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abraham gave all his possessions to Isaac:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abraham antoi kaikki mitä hänellä oli Iisakille.
verses.king_james: And Abraham gave all that he had unto Isaac.

verses.latin_vulgate: filiis autem concubinarum largitus est munera, et separavit eos ab Isaac filio suo, dum adhuc ipse viveret, ad plagam orientalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִבְנֵ֤י הַפִּֽילַגְשִׁים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְאַבְרָהָ֔ם נָתַ֥ן אַבְרָהָ֖ם מַתָּנֹ֑ת וַֽיְשַׁלְּחֵ֞ם מֵעַ֨ל יִצְחָ֤ק בְּנוֹ֙ בְּעוֹדֶ֣נּוּ חַ֔י קֵ֖דְמָה אֶל־אֶ֥רֶץ קֶֽדֶם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to the children of the concubines he gave gifts, and separated them from Isaac his son, while he yet lived, to the east country.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta niille lapsille, jotka jalkavaimoista olivat, antoi hän lahjoja, ja lähetti heidät pois poikansa Isaakin tyköä, vielä eläissänsä, idän puoleen, itäiselle maalle.
verses.king_james: But unto the sons of the concubines, which Abraham had, Abraham gave gifts, and sent them away from Isaac his son, while he yet lived, eastward, unto the east country.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fuerunt autem dies vitæ Abrahæ, centum septuaginta quinque anni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֗לֶּה יְמֵ֛י שְׁנֵֽי־חַיֵּ֥י אַבְרָהָ֖ם אֲשֶׁר־חָ֑י מְאַ֥ת שָׁנָ֛ה וְשִׁבְעִ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וְחָמֵ֥שׁ שָׁנִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the days of Abraham's life were a hundred and seventy-five years.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tämä on Abrahamin elinaika, kuin hän eli: sata ja viisikahdeksattakymmentä ajastaikaa.
verses.king_james: And these are the days of the years of Abraham’s life which he lived, an hundred threescore and fifteen years.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et deficiens mortuus est in senectute bona, provectæque ætatis et plenus dierum : congregatusque est ad populum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּגְוַ֨ע וַיָּ֧מׇת אַבְרָהָ֛ם בְּשֵׂיבָ֥ה טוֹבָ֖ה זָקֵ֣ן וְשָׂבֵ֑עַ וַיֵּאָ֖סֶף אֶל־עַמָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And decaying he died in a good old age, and having lived a long time, and being full of days: and was gathered to his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän tuli riutuneeksi, ja kuoli levollisessa ijässä, vanhana ja elämästä kyllänsä saanut: ja koottiin kansansa tykö.
verses.king_james: Then Abraham gave up the ghost, and died in a good old age, an old man, and full of years; and was gathered to his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sepelierunt eum Isaac et Ismaël filii sui in spelunca duplici, quæ sita est in agro Ephron filii Seor Hethæi, e regione Mambre,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקְבְּר֨וּ אֹת֜וֹ יִצְחָ֤ק וְיִשְׁמָעֵאל֙ בָּנָ֔יו אֶל־מְעָרַ֖ת הַמַּכְפֵּלָ֑ה אֶל־שְׂדֵ֞ה עֶפְרֹ֤ן בֶּן־צֹ֙חַר֙ הַֽחִתִּ֔י אֲשֶׁ֖ר עַל־פְּנֵ֥י מַמְרֵֽא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Isaac and Ismael his sons buried him in the double cave, which was situated in the field of Ephron the son of Seor the Hethite, over against Mambre,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen poikansa Isaak ja Ismael hautasivat hänen Makpelan luolaan: Ephronin Hetiläisen Zoarin pojan vainiossa, Mamren kohdalle:
verses.king_james: And his sons Isaac and Ishmael buried him in the cave of Machpelah, in the field of Ephron the son of Zohar the Hittite, which is before Mamre;

verses.latin_vulgate: quem emerat a filiis Heth : ibi sepultus est ipse, et Sara uxor ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַשָּׂדֶ֛ה אֲשֶׁר־קָנָ֥ה אַבְרָהָ֖ם מֵאֵ֣ת בְּנֵי־חֵ֑ת שָׁ֛מָּה קֻבַּ֥ר אַבְרָהָ֖ם וְשָׂרָ֥ה אִשְׁתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Which he had bought of the children of Heth: there was he buried, and Sara his wife.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sille kedolle, jonka Abraham oli ostanut Hetin lapsilta: siihen on Abraham haudattu, ja Saara hänen emäntänsä.
verses.king_james: The field which Abraham purchased of the sons of Heth: there was Abraham buried, and Sarah his wife.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et post obitum illius benedixit Deus Isaac filio ejus, qui habitabat juxta puteum nomine Viventis et videntis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֗י אַחֲרֵי֙ מ֣וֹת אַבְרָהָ֔ם וַיְבָ֥רֶךְ אֱלֹהִ֖ים אֶת־יִצְחָ֣ק בְּנ֑וֹ וַיֵּ֣שֶׁב יִצְחָ֔ק עִם־בְּאֵ֥ר לַחַ֖י רֹאִֽי׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And after his death, God blessed Isaac his son, who dwelt by the well named Of the living and seeing.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Abrahamin kuoleman jälkeen siunasi Jumala hänen poikansa Isaakin: Ja Isaak asui sen elävän, joka minun näkee, kaivon tykönä.
verses.king_james: And it came to pass after the death of Abraham, that God blessed his son Isaac; and Isaac dwelt by the well Lahai–roi.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ sunt generationes Ismaël filii Abrahæ, quem peperit ei Agar Ægyptia, famula Saræ : et
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה תֹּלְדֹ֥ת יִשְׁמָעֵ֖אל בֶּן־אַבְרָהָ֑ם אֲשֶׁ֨ר יָלְדָ֜ה הָגָ֧ר הַמִּצְרִ֛ית שִׁפְחַ֥ת שָׂרָ֖ה לְאַבְרָהָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: These are the generations of Ismael the son of Abraham, whom Agar the Egyptian, Sara's servant, bore unto him:
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta nämät ovat Ismaelin Abrahamin pojan sukukunnat, jonka Hagar Egyptiläinen Saaran piika synnytti.
verses.king_james: Now these are the generations of Ishmael, Abraham’s son, whom Hagar the Egyptian, Sarah’s handmaid, bare unto Abraham:

verses.latin_vulgate: hæc nomina filiorum ejus in vocabulis et generationibus suis. Primogenitus Ismaëlis Nabaioth, deinde Cedar, et Adbeel, et Mabsam,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֗לֶּה שְׁמוֹת֙ בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׁמָעֵ֔אל בִּשְׁמֹתָ֖ם לְתוֹלְדֹתָ֑ם בְּכֹ֤ר יִשְׁמָעֵאל֙ נְבָיֹ֔ת וְקֵדָ֥ר וְאַדְבְּאֵ֖ל וּמִבְשָֽׂם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And these are the names of his children according to their calling and generations. The firstborn of Ismael was Nabajoth, then Cedar, and Adbeel, and Mabsam,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämä ovat Ismaelin poikain nimet, heidän nimeinsä ja sukukuntainsa jälkeen: Ismaelin esikoinen oli Nebaot, Kedar, Abdeel, Mibsam,
verses.king_james: And these are the names of the sons of Ishmael, by their names, according to their generations: the firstborn of Ishmael, Nebajoth; and Kedar, and Adbeel, and Mibsam,

verses.latin_vulgate: Masma quoque, et Duma, et Massa,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִשְׁמָ֥ע וְדוּמָ֖ה וּמַשָּֽׂא׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Masma, and Duma, and Massa,
verses.finnish_biblia: Misma, Duma, Masa,
verses.king_james: And Mishma, and Dumah, and Massa,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hadar, et Thema, et Jethur, et Naphis, et Cedma.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֲדַ֣ד וְתֵימָ֔א יְט֥וּר נָפִ֖ישׁ וָקֵֽדְמָה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Hadar, and Thema, and Jethur, and Naphis, and Cedma.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hadar, Tema, Jetur, Naphis ja Kedma.
verses.king_james: Hadar, and Tema, Jetur, Naphish, and Kedemah:

verses.latin_vulgate: Isti sunt filii Ismaëlis : et hæc nomina per castella et oppida eorum, duodecim principes tribuum suarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה הֵ֞ם בְּנֵ֤י יִשְׁמָעֵאל֙ וְאֵ֣לֶּה שְׁמֹתָ֔ם בְּחַצְרֵיהֶ֖ם וּבְטִֽירֹתָ֑ם שְׁנֵים־עָשָׂ֥ר נְשִׂיאִ֖ם לְאֻמֹּתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: These are the sons of Ismael: and these are their names by their castles and towns, twelve princes of their tribes.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat Ismaelin lapset, ja nämät heidän nimensä, heidän kylissänsä ja kaupungeissansa: kaksitoistakymmentä ruhtinasta heidän kansoissansa.
verses.king_james: These are the sons of Ishmael, and these are their names, by their towns, and by their castles; twelve princes according to their nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et facti sunt anni vitæ Ismaëlis centum triginta septem, deficiensque mortuus est, et appositus ad populum suum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֗לֶּה שְׁנֵי֙ חַיֵּ֣י יִשְׁמָעֵ֔אל מְאַ֥ת שָׁנָ֛ה וּשְׁלֹשִׁ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה וְשֶׁ֣בַע שָׁנִ֑ים וַיִּגְוַ֣ע וַיָּ֔מׇת וַיֵּאָ֖סֶף אֶל־עַמָּֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the years of Ismael's life were a hundred and thirty-seven, and decaying he died, and was gathered unto his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tämä on Ismaelin ikä: sata ja seitsemänneljättäkymmentä ajastaikaa: ja hän tuli riutuneeksi, ja kuoli, ja koottiin kansansa tykö.
verses.king_james: And these are the years of the life of Ishmael, an hundred and thirty and seven years: and he gave up the ghost and died; and was gathered unto his people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitavit autem ab Hevila usque Sur, quæ respicit Ægyptum introëuntibus Assyrios ; coram cunctis fratribus suis obiit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁכְּנ֨וּ מֵֽחֲוִילָ֜ה עַד־שׁ֗וּר אֲשֶׁר֙ עַל־פְּנֵ֣י מִצְרַ֔יִם בֹּאֲכָ֖ה אַשּׁ֑וּרָה עַל־פְּנֵ֥י כׇל־אֶחָ֖יו נָפָֽל׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And he dwelt from Hevila as far as Sur, which looketh towards Egypt, to them that go towards the Assyrians. He died in the presence of all his brethren.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta he asuivat Hevilasta hamaan Surriin asti, joka on Egyptin kohdalla Assyriaan mentäissä. Kaikkein hänen veljeinsä kohdalle lankesi (hänen arpansa).
verses.king_james: And they dwelt from Havilah unto Shur, that is before Egypt, as thou goest toward Assyria: and he died in the presence of all his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ quoque sunt generationes Isaac filii Abraham : Abraham genuit Isaac :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה תּוֹלְדֹ֥ת יִצְחָ֖ק בֶּן־אַבְרָהָ֑ם אַבְרָהָ֖ם הוֹלִ֥יד אֶת־יִצְחָֽק׃
verses.douay_rheims: These also are the generations of Isaac the son of Abraham: Abraham begot Isaac:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja nämät ovat Isaakin Abrahamin pojan sukukunnat: Abraham siitti Isaakin.
verses.king_james: And these are the generations of Isaac, Abraham’s son: Abraham begat Isaac:

verses.latin_vulgate: qui cum quadraginta esset annorum, duxit uxorem Rebeccam filiam Bathuelis Syri de Mesopotamia, sororem Laban.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְהִ֤י יִצְחָק֙ בֶּן־אַרְבָּעִ֣ים שָׁנָ֔ה בְּקַחְתּ֣וֹ אֶת־רִבְקָ֗ה בַּת־בְּתוּאֵל֙ הָֽאֲרַמִּ֔י מִפַּדַּ֖ן אֲרָ֑ם אֲח֛וֹת לָבָ֥ן הָאֲרַמִּ֖י ל֥וֹ לְאִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who when he was forty years old, took to wife Rebecca the daughter of Bathuel the Syrian of Mesopotamia, sister to Laban.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Isaak oli neljänkymmenen ajastaikainen, koska hän otti Rebekan Betuelin Syrialaisen tyttären Mesopotamiasta, Labanin syrialaisen sisaren, itsellensä emännäksi.
verses.king_james: And Isaac was forty years old when he took Rebekah to wife, the daughter of Bethuel the Syrian of Padan–aram, the sister to Laban the Syrian.

verses.latin_vulgate: Deprecatusque est Isaac Dominum pro uxore sua, eo quod esset sterilis : qui exaudivit eum, et dedit conceptum Rebeccæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּעְתַּ֨ר יִצְחָ֤ק לַֽיהֹוָה֙ לְנֹ֣כַח אִשְׁתּ֔וֹ כִּ֥י עֲקָרָ֖ה הִ֑וא וַיֵּעָ֤תֶר לוֹ֙ יְהֹוָ֔ה וַתַּ֖הַר רִבְקָ֥ה אִשְׁתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Isaac besought the Lord for his wife, because she was barren: and he heard him, and made Rebecca to conceive.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Isaak rukoili Herraa emäntänsä edestä; sillä hän oli hedelmätöin, ja Herra kuuli häntä: niin Rebekka hänen emäntänsä tuli raskaaksi.
verses.king_james: And Isaac intreated the Lord for his wife, because she was barren: and the Lord was intreated of him, and Rebekah his wife conceived.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed collidebantur in utero ejus parvuli ; quæ ait : Si sic mihi futurum erat, quid necesse fuit concipere ? perrexitque ut consuleret Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְרֹֽצְצ֤וּ הַבָּנִים֙ בְּקִרְבָּ֔הּ וַתֹּ֣אמֶר אִם־כֵּ֔ן לָ֥מָּה זֶּ֖ה אָנֹ֑כִי וַתֵּ֖לֶךְ לִדְרֹ֥שׁ אֶת־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But the children struggled in her womb, and she said: If it were to be so with me, what need was there to conceive? And she went to consult the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja lapset sysäsivät toinen toistansa hänen kohdussansa. Niin hän sanoi: jos näin piti käymän, miksi minä olen (raskaaksi tullut?) ja meni kysymään Herralta.
verses.king_james: And the children struggled together within her; and she said, If it be so, why am I thus? And she went to enquire of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui respondens ait :   Duæ gentes sunt in utero tuo,  et duo populi ex ventre tuo dividentur,  populusque populum superabit,  et major serviet minori.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה לָ֗הּ שְׁנֵ֤י (גיים) [גוֹיִם֙] בְּבִטְנֵ֔ךְ וּשְׁנֵ֣י לְאֻמִּ֔ים מִמֵּעַ֖יִךְ יִפָּרֵ֑דוּ וּלְאֹם֙ מִלְאֹ֣ם יֶֽאֱמָ֔ץ וְרַ֖ב יַעֲבֹ֥ד צָעִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he answering, said: Two nations are in thy womb, and two peoples shall be divided out of thy womb, and one people shall overcome the other, and the elder shall serve the younger.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi hänelle: kaksi kansaa ovat sinun kohdussas, ja kahtalainen väki erkanee sinun ruumiistas: mutta toinen kansa voittaa toisen, ja suurempi palvelee vähempää.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto her, Two nations are in thy womb, and two manner of people shall be separated from thy bowels; and the one people shall be stronger than the other people; and the elder shall serve the younger.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jam tempus pariendi advenerat, et ecce gemini in utero ejus reperti sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּמְלְא֥וּ יָמֶ֖יהָ לָלֶ֑דֶת וְהִנֵּ֥ה תוֹמִ֖ם בְּבִטְנָֽהּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when her time was come to be delivered, behold twins were found in her womb.
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska aika tuli synnyttää; katso, kaksoiset olivat hänen kohdussansa.
verses.king_james: And when her days to be delivered were fulfilled, behold, there were twins in her womb.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui prior egressus est, rufus erat, et totus in morem pellis hispidus : vocatumque est nomen ejus Esau. Protinus alter egrediens, plantam fratris tenebat manu : et idcirco appellavit eum Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּצֵ֤א הָרִאשׁוֹן֙ אַדְמוֹנִ֔י כֻּלּ֖וֹ כְּאַדֶּ֣רֶת שֵׂעָ֑ר וַיִּקְרְא֥וּ שְׁמ֖וֹ עֵשָֽׂו׃
verses.douay_rheims: He that came forth first was red, and hairy like a skin: and his name was called Esau. Immediately the other coming forth, held his brother's foot in his hand: and therefore he was called Jacob.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ensimäinen joka tuli ulos, oli ruskia ja karvainen niinkuin vaate: sentähden kutsuivat he hänen nimensä Esau.
verses.king_james: And the first came out red, all over like an hairy garment; and they called his name Esau.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sexagenarius erat Isaac quando nati sunt ei parvuli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַֽחֲרֵי־כֵ֞ן יָצָ֣א אָחִ֗יו וְיָד֤וֹ אֹחֶ֙זֶת֙ בַּעֲקֵ֣ב עֵשָׂ֔ו וַיִּקְרָ֥א שְׁמ֖וֹ יַעֲקֹ֑ב וְיִצְחָ֛ק בֶּן־שִׁשִּׁ֥ים שָׁנָ֖ה בְּלֶ֥דֶת אֹתָֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Isaac was threescore years old when the children were born unto him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Senjälkeen tuli ulos hänen veljensä, joka piti kädellänsä Esaun kantapäästä, ja se kutsuivat hänen nimensä Jakob. Kuudenkymmenen ajastaikainen oli Isaak heidän syntyissänsä.
verses.king_james: And after that came his brother out, and his hand took hold on Esau’s heel; and his name was called Jacob: and Isaac was threescore years old when she bare them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quibus adultis, factus est Esau vir gnarus venandi, et homo agricola : Jacob autem vir simplex habitabat in tabernaculis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּגְדְּלוּ֙ הַנְּעָרִ֔ים וַיְהִ֣י עֵשָׂ֗ו אִ֛ישׁ יֹדֵ֥עַ צַ֖יִד אִ֣ישׁ שָׂדֶ֑ה וְיַעֲקֹב֙ אִ֣ישׁ תָּ֔ם יֹשֵׁ֖ב אֹהָלִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when they were grown up, Esau became a skilful hunter, and a husbandman: but Jacob, a plain man, dwelt in tents.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja poikaiset kasvoivat, ja Esau tuli jaloksi metsä- ja peltomieheksi. Mutta Jakob oli yksivakainen mies, ja asui majoissa.
verses.king_james: And the boys grew: and Esau was a cunning hunter, a man of the field; and Jacob was a plain man, dwelling in tents.

verses.latin_vulgate: Isaac amabat Esau, eo quod de venationibus illius vesceretur : et Rebecca diligebat Jacob.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֶּאֱהַ֥ב יִצְחָ֛ק אֶת־עֵשָׂ֖ו כִּי־צַ֣יִד בְּפִ֑יו וְרִבְקָ֖ה אֹהֶ֥בֶת אֶֽת־יַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Isaac loved Esau, because he ate of his hunting: and Rebecca loved Jacob.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Isaak rakasti Esauta; sillä hän söi mielellänsä hänen metsäsaalistansa. Mutta Rebekka rakasti Jakobia.
verses.king_james: And Isaac loved Esau, because he did eat of his venison: but Rebekah loved Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Coxit autem Jacob pulmentum : ad quem cum venisset Esau de agro lassus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּ֥זֶד יַעֲקֹ֖ב נָזִ֑יד וַיָּבֹ֥א עֵשָׂ֛ו מִן־הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה וְה֥וּא עָיֵֽף׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jacob boiled pottage: to whom Esau, coming faint out of the field,
verses.finnish_biblia: Koska Jakob oli keittänyt herkun, tuli Esau metsästä, ja oli väsyksissä.
verses.king_james: And Jacob sod pottage: and Esau came from the field, and he was faint:

verses.latin_vulgate: ait : Da mihi de coctione hac rufa, quia oppido lassus sum. Quam ob causam vocatum est nomen ejus Edom.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר עֵשָׂ֜ו אֶֽל־יַעֲקֹ֗ב הַלְעִיטֵ֤נִי נָא֙ מִן־הָאָדֹ֤ם הָאָדֹם֙ הַזֶּ֔ה כִּ֥י עָיֵ֖ף אָנֹ֑כִי עַל־כֵּ֥ן קָרָֽא־שְׁמ֖וֹ אֱדֽוֹם׃
verses.douay_rheims: Said: Give me of this red pottage, for I am exceeding faint. For which reason his name was called Edom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Esau sanoi Jakobille: anna minun syödä tästä ruskiasta herkusta: sillä minä olen väsyksissä. Sentähden kutsutaan hänen nimensä Edom.
verses.king_james: And Esau said to Jacob, Feed me, I pray thee, with that same red pottage; for I am faint: therefore was his name called Edom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cui dixit Jacob : Vende mihi primogenita tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֖אמֶר יַעֲקֹ֑ב מִכְרָ֥ה כַיּ֛וֹם אֶת־בְּכֹרָתְךָ֖ לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Jacob said to him: Sell me thy first birthright.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta Jakob sanoi: myy minulle tänäpänä sinun esikoisuutes.
verses.king_james: And Jacob said, Sell me this day thy birthright.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ille respondit : En morior, quid mihi proderunt primogenita ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר עֵשָׂ֔ו הִנֵּ֛ה אָנֹכִ֥י הוֹלֵ֖ךְ לָמ֑וּת וְלָמָּה־זֶּ֥ה לִ֖י בְּכֹרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: He answered: Lo I die, what will the first birthright avail me?
verses.finnish_biblia: Esau vastasi: katso, minä kuolen kuitenkin; mitä minun esikoisuudesta on?
verses.king_james: And Esau said, Behold, I am at the point to die: and what profit shall this birthright do to me?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ait Jacob : Jura ergo mihi. Juravit ei Esau et vendidit primogenita.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר יַעֲקֹ֗ב הִשָּׁ֤בְעָה לִּי֙ כַּיּ֔וֹם וַיִּשָּׁבַ֖ע ל֑וֹ וַיִּמְכֹּ֥ר אֶת־בְּכֹרָת֖וֹ לְיַעֲקֹֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: Jacob said: Swear therefore to me. Esau swore to him, and sold his first birthright.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jakob sanoi: niin vanno minulle tänäpänä: ja hän vannoi hänelle, ja myi Jakobille esikoisuutensa.
verses.king_james: And Jacob said, Swear to me this day; and he sware unto him: and he sold his birthright unto Jacob.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et sic, accepto pane et lentis edulio, comedit et bibit, et abiit, parvipendens quod primogenita vendidisset.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיַעֲקֹ֞ב נָתַ֣ן לְעֵשָׂ֗ו לֶ֚חֶם וּנְזִ֣יד עֲדָשִׁ֔ים וַיֹּ֣אכַל וַיֵּ֔שְׁתְּ וַיָּ֖קׇם וַיֵּלַ֑ךְ וַיִּ֥בֶז עֵשָׂ֖ו אֶת־הַבְּכֹרָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And so taking bread and the pottage of lentils, he ate, and drank, and went on his way; making little account of having sold his first birthright.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin Jakob antoi Esaulle leivän, ja sen ruskian herneherkun, ja hän söi ja joi, ja nousi ja meni pois. Ja niin Esau katsoi esikoisuutensa ylön.
verses.king_james: Then Jacob gave Esau bread and pottage of lentiles; and he did eat and drink, and rose up, and went his way: thus Esau despised his birthright.
